name: western-burger-fries
input: a quarter-pound cheeseburger with lettuce, tomato, and a small portion of fries
notes: USDA composite: 113g (1/4 lb) ground beef patty 80/20 ~290 kcal, slice American cheese ~70 kcal, brioche bun ~230 kcal, condiments + veg ~30 kcal, small fries (~85g) ~270 kcal. Advisory tier — fry portion 'small' varies 70–100g.
